title: Gynochthodes trimera
taxonomy: Gynochthodes trimera is classified within the family Rubiaceae, which is a large and diverse family of flowering plants commonly known as the coffee or madder family. This family is part of the order Gentianales, which also includes other flowering plant families such as Apocynaceae and Loganiaceae. The order Gentianales is further grouped into the clade Asterids, a larger group of flowering plants that also includes the orders Lamiales and Solanales. Within the family Rubiaceae, Gynochthodes trimera is likely to be a member of the subfamily Ixoroideae, which is one of the most diverse and widespread subfamilies within the family. Further classification and study are needed to confirm the exact position of Gynochthodes trimera within the plant kingdom.
